name: Stir-Fried Beef Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze beef; slice thinly across the grain into bite-size strips.
2. In a wok or large skillet, cook half the beef in hot oil until browned on all sides. Remove from pan. Repeat with remaining beef and garlic; remove from pan.
3. Add mushrooms, cucumber, green pepper strips, onion rings, Italian seasoning, salt, and red pepper to wok. Stir-fry 3 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender. Return beef to wok; add tomato wedges. Cook 1-2 minutes or until heated through.
4. Remove meat-vegetable mixture to serving bowl; keep warm.
5. Add spinach leaves to wok; cover and cook for 1 minute or until slightly wilted. To serve, arrange spinach on four bowls or plates; spoon meat mixture atop.
